mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_warranty_callback (`projectId`, `projectCode`, `officeCode`, `contractNos`, `projectIds`, `projectName`, `serviceImpl`, `industryName`, `agentChannel`, `finalCustomerName`, `customer1`, `customerContact1`, `customer2`, `customerContact2`, `warrantyStartTime`, `warrantyEndTime`, `renewalIntention`, `callbackTime`, `nextCallbackTime`, `taskId`, `quesnaireId`, `quesnaireVersion`, `quesnaireState`, `isDelete`, `remark`, `compId`, `createBy`, `createTime`, `updateBy`, `updateTime`, `customInfo`) values (#projectId:INTEGER#, #projectCode:VARCHAR#, #officeCode:VARCHAR#, #contractNos:VARCHAR#, #projectIds:VARCHAR#, #projectName:VARCHAR#, #serviceImpl:VARCHAR#, #industryName:VARCHAR#, #agentChannel:VARCHAR#, #finalCustomerName:VARCHAR#, #customer1:VARCHAR#, #customerContact1:VARCHAR#, #customer2:VARCHAR#, #customerContact2:VARCHAR#, #warrantyStartTime:DATE#, #warrantyEndTime:DATE#, #renewalIntention:INTEGER#, #callbackTime:TIMESTAMP#, #nextCallbackTime:TIMESTAMP#, #taskId:VARCHAR#, #quesnaireId:INTEGER#, #quesnaireVersion:INTEGER#, #quesnaireState:INTEGER#, #isDelete:BIT#, #remark:VARCHAR#, #compId:INTEGER#, #createBy:VARCHAR#, #createTime:TIMESTAMP#, #updateBy:VARCHAR#, #updateTime:TIMESTAMP#, #customInfo:JSON#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

insert into pm_project_warranty_callback
<if test=" prepend="," projectId> `projectId` <if test=" prepend="," projectCode> `projectCode` <if test=" prepend="," officeCode> `officeCode` <if test=" prepend="," contractNos> `contractNos` <if test=" prepend="," projectIds> `projectIds` <if test=" prepend="," projectName> `projectName` <if test=" prepend="," serviceImpl> `serviceImpl` <if test=" prepend="," industryName> `industryName` <if test=" prepend="," agentChannel> `agentChannel` <if test=" prepend="," finalCustomerName> `finalCustomerName` <if test=" prepend="," customer1> `customer1` <if test=" prepend="," customerContact1> `customerContact1` <if test=" prepend="," customer2> `customer2` <if test=" prepend="," customerContact2> `customerContact2` <if test=" prepend="," warrantyStartTime> `warrantyStartTime` <if test=" prepend="," warrantyEndTime> `warrantyEndTime` <if test=" prepend="," renewalIntention> `renewalIntention` <if test=" prepend="," callbackTime> `callbackTime` <if test=" prepend="," nextCallbackTime> `nextCallbackTime` <if test=" prepend="," taskId> `taskId` <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireId> `quesnaireId` <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireVersion> `quesnaireVersion` <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireState> `quesnaireState` <if test=" prepend="," isDelete> `isDelete` <if test=" prepend="," remark> `remark` <if test=" prepend="," compId> `compId` <if test=" prepend="," createBy> `createBy` <if test=" prepend="," createTime> `createTime` <if test=" prepend="," updateBy> `updateBy` <if test=" prepend="," updateTime> `updateTime` <if test=" prepend="," customInfo> `customInfo` )
values
<if test=" prepend="," projectId> #projectId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," projectCode> #projectCode:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," officeCode> #officeCode:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," contractNos> #contractNos:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," projectIds> #projectIds:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," projectName> #projectName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," serviceImpl> #serviceImpl:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," industryName> #industryName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," agentChannel> #agentChannel:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," finalCustomerName> #finalCustomerName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customer1> #customer1:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customerContact1> #customerContact1:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customer2> #customer2:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customerContact2> #customerContact2:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," warrantyStartTime> #warrantyStartTime:DATE# <if test=" prepend="," warrantyEndTime> #warrantyEndTime:DATE# <if test=" prepend="," renewalIntention> #renewalIntention:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," callbackTime> #callbackTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," nextCallbackTime> #nextCallbackTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," taskId> #taskId:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireId> #quesnaireId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireVersion> #quesnaireVersion:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireState> #quesnaireState:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," isDelete> #isDelete:BIT# <if test=" prepend="," remark> #remark:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," compId> #compId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," createBy> #createBy:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," createTime> #createTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," updateBy> #updateBy:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," updateTime> #updateTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," customInfo> #customInfo:JSON# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
update pm_project_warranty_callback
<if test=" prepend="," projectId> `projectId` = #projectId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," projectCode> `projectCode` = #projectCode:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," officeCode> `officeCode` = #officeCode:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," contractNos> `contractNos` = #contractNos:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," projectIds> `projectIds` = #projectIds:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," projectName> `projectName` = #projectName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," serviceImpl> `serviceImpl` = #serviceImpl:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," industryName> `industryName` = #industryName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," agentChannel> `agentChannel` = #agentChannel:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," finalCustomerName> `finalCustomerName` = #finalCustomerName:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customer1> `customer1` = #customer1:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customerContact1> `customerContact1` = #customerContact1:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customer2> `customer2` = #customer2:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," customerContact2> `customerContact2` = #customerContact2:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," warrantyStartTime> `warrantyStartTime` = #warrantyStartTime:DATE# <if test=" prepend="," warrantyEndTime> `warrantyEndTime` = #warrantyEndTime:DATE# <if test=" prepend="," renewalIntention> `renewalIntention` = #renewalIntention:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," callbackTime> `callbackTime` = #callbackTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," nextCallbackTime> `nextCallbackTime` = #nextCallbackTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," taskId> `taskId` = #taskId:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireId> `quesnaireId` = #quesnaireId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireVersion> `quesnaireVersion` = #quesnaireVersion:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," quesnaireState> `quesnaireState` = #quesnaireState:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," isDelete> `isDelete` = #isDelete:BIT# <if test=" prepend="," remark> `remark` = #remark:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," compId> `compId` = #compId:INTEGER# <if test=" prepend="," createBy> `createBy` = #createBy:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," createTime> `createTime` = #createTime:TIMESTAMP# <if test=" prepend="," updateBy> `updateBy` = #updateBy:VARCHAR# <if test=" prepend="," updateTime> `updateTime` = #updateTime:TIMESTAMP#
<if test=" prepend="," customInfo> customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# )
where `id` = #id:INTEGER#
mapper.select: select pwc.* from pm_project_warranty_callback pwc where pwc.`id` = #id:INTEGER#
mapper.sql:
<if test=" prepend="AND" id> pwc.`id` = #{id} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" projectId> pwc.`projectId` = #{projectId} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" officeCode> pwc.`officeCode` = #{officeCode} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> pwc.`projectIds` = #{projectIds} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" serviceImpl> pwc.`serviceImpl` = #{serviceImpl} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" projectCode> pwc.`projectCode` like concat("%", #{projectCode}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" contractNos> pwc.`contractNos` like concat("%", #{contractNos}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" projectName> pwc.`projectName` like concat("%", #{projectName}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" industryName> pwc.`industryName` like concat("%", #{industryName}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" agentChannel> pwc.`agentChannel` like concat("%", #{agentChannel}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" finalCustomerName> pwc.`finalCustomerName` like concat("%", #{finalCustomerName}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" customer1> pwc.`customer1` like concat("%", #{customer1}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" customerContact1> pwc.`customerContact1` like concat("%", #{customerContact1}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" customer2> pwc.`customer2` like concat("%", #{customer2}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" customerContact2> pwc.`customerContact2` like concat("%", #{customerContact2}, "%") 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyStartTime> pwc.`warrantyStartTime` = #{warrantyStartTime} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyEndTime> pwc.`warrantyEndTime` = #{warrantyEndTime} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" renewalIntention> pwc.`renewalIntention` = #{renewalIntention} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" callbackTime> pwc.`callbackTime` = #{callbackTime} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" nextCallbackTime> pwc.`nextCallbackTime` = #{nextCallbackTime} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" taskId> pwc.`taskId` = #{taskId} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" quesnaireId> pwc.`quesnaireId` = #{quesnaireId} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" quesnaireVersion> pwc.`quesnaireVersion` = #{quesnaireVersion} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" quesnaireState> pwc.`quesnaireState` = #{quesnaireState} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" isDelete> pwc.`isDelete` = #{isDelete} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" remark> pwc.`remark` = #{remark} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" compId> pwc.`compId` = #{compId} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" createBy> pwc.`createBy` = #{createBy} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" createTime> pwc.`createTime` = #{createTime} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" updateBy> pwc.`updateBy` = #{updateBy} 
	<if test=" prepend="AND" updateTime> pwc.`updateTime` = #{updateTime} 
	
	<if test=" customInfo>
        
            <if test=" prepend="AND" property="customInfo.iterator[].value">
                #customInfo.iterator[].value# = pwc.customInfo ->> '$$.$customInfo.iterator[].key$'
            
        
        
    
	
	<if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyEndTimeStart> pwc.warrantyEndTime >= #{warrantyEndTimeStart} 
   	<if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyEndTimeEnd> #{warrantyEndTimeEnd} >= pwc.warrantyEndTime 
   	<if test=" prepend="AND" processStartTime> pwc.callbackTime >= #{processStartTime} 
   	<if test=" prepend="AND" processEndTime> #{processEndTime} >= pwc.callbackTime 
   	<if test=" prepend="AND" callbackTimeStart> pwc.callbackTime >= #{callbackTimeStart} 
 	<if test=" prepend="AND" callbackTimeEnd> #{callbackTimeEnd} >= pwc.callbackTime 
 	<if test=" prepend="AND" nextCallbackTimeStart> pwc.nextCallbackTime >= #{nextCallbackTimeStart} 
 	<if test=" prepend="AND" nextCallbackTimeEnd> #{nextCallbackTimeEnd} >= pwc.nextCallbackTime 
 	<if test=" prepend="AND" customerSearch>
 		(
			pwc.customer1 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") 
			or pwc.customer2 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") 
			or pwc.customerContact1 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") 
			or pwc.customerContact2 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%")
		)
 	
 	<if test=" prepend="AND" customerContactSearch>
		(
			pwc.customerContact1 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") 
			or pwc.customerContact2 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") 
		)
	
	
	<if test=" prepend="AND" customerContactSearch>
        (
            pwc.customerContact1 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") 
            or pwc.customerContact2 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") 
        )
    
    <if test=" prepend="AND" salerSearch>
        (
            slm.memberCode = #{salerSearch}
            or slm.memberName like concat("%", #{salerSearch}, "%") 
            or slm.phoneNum like concat("%", #{salerSearch}, "%") 
        )

<if test=" model> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.id"> pwc.`id` = #model.id# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.projectId"> pwc.`projectId` = #model.projectId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.officeCode"> pwc.`officeCode` = #model.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.projectIds"> pwc.`projectIds` = #model.projectIds# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.serviceImpl"> pwc.`serviceImpl` = #model.serviceImpl# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.projectCode"> pwc.`projectCode` like concat("%", #model.projectCode#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.contractNos"> pwc.`contractNos` like concat("%", #model.contractNos#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.projectName"> pwc.`projectName` like concat("%", #model.projectName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.industryName"> pwc.`industryName` like concat("%", #model.industryName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.agentChannel"> pwc.`agentChannel` like concat("%", #model.agentChannel#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.finalCustomerName"> pwc.`finalCustomerName` like concat("%", #model.finalCustomerName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customer1"> pwc.`customer1` like concat("%", #model.customer1#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customerContact1"> pwc.`customerContact1` like concat("%", #model.customerContact1#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customer2"> pwc.`customer2` like concat("%", #model.customer2#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customerContact2"> pwc.`customerContact2` like concat("%", #model.customerContact2#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.warrantyStartTime"> pwc.`warrantyStartTime` = #model.warrantyStartTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.warrantyEndTime"> pwc.`warrantyEndTime` = #model.warrantyEndTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.renewalIntention"> pwc.`renewalIntention` = #model.renewalIntention# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.callbackTime"> pwc.`callbackTime` = #model.callbackTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.nextCallbackTime"> pwc.`nextCallbackTime` = #model.nextCallbackTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.taskId"> pwc.`taskId` = #model.taskId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.quesnaireId"> pwc.`quesnaireId` = #model.quesnaireId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.quesnaireVersion"> pwc.`quesnaireVersion` = #model.quesnaireVersion# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.quesnaireState"> pwc.`quesnaireState` = #model.quesnaireState# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.isDelete"> pwc.`isDelete` = #model.isDelete# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.remark"> pwc.`remark` = #model.remark# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.compId"> pwc.`compId` = #model.compId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createBy"> pwc.`createBy` = #model.createBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createTime"> pwc.`createTime` = #model.createTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateBy"> pwc.`updateBy` = #model.updateBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateTime"> pwc.`updateTime` = #model.updateTime#
<if test=" property="model.customInfo">
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customInfo.iterator[].value"> #model.customInfo.iterator[].value# = pwc.customInfo ->> '$$.$model.customInfo.iterator[].key$'
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.warrantyEndTimeStart"> pwc.warrantyEndTime >= #model.warrantyEndTimeStart# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.warrantyEndTimeEnd"> #model.warrantyEndTimeEnd# >= pwc.warrantyEndTime <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.processStartTime"> pwc.callbackTime >= #model.processStartTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.processEndTime"> #model.processEndTime# >= pwc.callbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.callbackTimeStart"> pwc.callbackTime >= #model.callbackTimeStart# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.callbackTimeEnd"> #model.callbackTimeEnd# >= pwc.callbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.nextCallbackTimeStart"> pwc.nextCallbackTime >= #model.nextCallbackTimeStart# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.nextCallbackTimeEnd"> #model.nextCallbackTimeEnd# >= pwc.nextCallbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customerSearch"> ( pwc.customer1 like concat("%", #model.customerSearch#, "%") or pwc.customer2 like concat("%", #model.customerSearch#, "%") or pwc.customerContact1 like concat("%", #model.customerSearch#, "%") or pwc.customerContact2 like concat("%", #model.customerSearch#, "%") )
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customerContactSearch"> ( pwc.customerContact1 like concat("%", #model.customerContactSearch#, "%") or pwc.customerContact2 like concat("%", #model.customerContactSearch#, "%") )
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.salerSearch"> ( slm.memberCode = #model.salerSearch# or slm.memberName like concat("%", #model.salerSearch#, "%") or slm.phoneNum like concat("%", #model.salerSearch#, "%") )

<if test=" displayParam> <if test=" property="displayParam.sort"> order by $displayParam.sort$
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.select: select pwc.* , slm.`memberCode` as salerCode , CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(slm.`memberName`, CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) AS salerName , slm.`phoneNum` as salerContact from pm_project_warranty_callback AS `pwc` LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = pwc.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = "10" AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null

select count(1) from pm_project_warranty_callback AS `pwc` <if test=" prepend="AND" salerSearch> LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = pwc.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = "10" AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null

select pwc.* , slm.`memberCode` as salerCode , CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(slm.`memberName`, CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) AS salerName , slm.`phoneNum` as salerContact from pm_project_warranty_callback AS `pwc` LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = pwc.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = "10" AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null

select count(1) from pm_project_warranty_callback AS `pwc` <if test=" prepend="AND" salerSearch> LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = pwc.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = "10" AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null
mapper.sql:
select pwc.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, c.name AS companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr, IFNULL(ssfs1.basicDataName, '未指定') AS serviceName <if test=" hideQuesnaire compareValue="true" prepend=","> qrt.*
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true" prepend=","> IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, 0, SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`))) warrantyStatus, IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = -1, '维保内', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 0 OR SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, '部分保外', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 1, '维保外', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyStatusName,
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.contractNo, ":", wcs.warrantyStatusName, "(", DATE(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS warrantyStatusDesc, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) warrantyGrade, IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 1, '基本维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 2, '中级维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 3, '高级维保', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyGradeName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) warrantyGradeStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) warrantyGradeEndTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.gradedesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS warrantyGradeDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.hasRenewal), 0) hasRenewal, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.renewalDesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS renewalDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.hasLiscense), 0) hasLiscense, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.liscenseDesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS liscenseDesc
, slm.`memberCode` as salerCode , CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(slm.`memberName`, CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) AS salerName , slm.`phoneNum` as salerContact from pm_project_warranty_callback AS `pwc` <if test=" hideQuesnaire compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN projectWarrantyCallback_tempQuesnaireResultTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = pwc.`quesnaireId`
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON ph.projectId = pwc.projectId LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `view_warranty_contract_state` wcs ON wcs.`contractNo` = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-C", ""), "-L", "")
LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = pwc.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = "10" AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data ssfs1 ON ssfs1.dataTypeCode = '15' AND ssfs1.basicDataId = pwc.serviceImpl AND ssfs1.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = pwc.`officeCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.id = pwc.compId
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true"> GROUP BY pwc.id
<if test=" hideWarranty compareValue="true"> <if test=" model> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.hasRenewal"> hasRenewal = #model.hasRenewal# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.hasLiscense"> hasLiscense = #model.hasLiscense#

SELECT ph.`projectId`, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, ph.projectType, ph.`column001` as officeCode, fd.`departmentName` as officeName, c.name as companyName, c.abbr as companyAbbr,
ph.column005 AS industryName, ph.column013 AS finalCustomerName, ph.compId, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pm.`memberName` order by pm.phoneNum) as customer1, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pm.`phoneNum` order by pm.phoneNum) as customerContact1, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ppfs.linkmanName order by ppfs.linkmanTel) as customer2, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ppfs.`linkmanTel` order by ppfs.linkmanTel) as customerContact2,
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT slm.`memberCode` order by slm.memberCode) as salerCode, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-", REPLACE(slm.`memberName`, CONCAT(slm.`memberCode`, "-"), "")) order by slm.memberCode) AS salerName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT slm.`phoneNum` order by slm.memberCode) as salerContact,
prp.`partyName` as agentChannel, IFNULL(ph.column012, ph.columno12_readonly) AS serviceImpl, IFNULL(IFNULL(ssfs1.basicDataName, ssfs2.basicDataName), '未指定') AS serviceName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.contractNo) as contractNos, IFNULL(IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, 0, SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`))), 1) warrantyStatus, IFNULL(IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = -1, '维保内', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 0 OR SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) > 1, '部分保外', IF(SUM(DISTINCT IF(wcs.`diff` = 0, 99, wcs.`diff`)) = 1, '维保外', NULL) ) ), '维保外') AS warrantyStatusName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`) AS warrantyStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`) AS warrantyEndTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(wcs.contractNo, ":", wcs.warrantyStatusName, "(", DATE(wcs.`warrantyStartTime`), "~", DATE(wcs.`warrantyEndTime`), ")") SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS warrantyStatusDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`), 0) warrantyGrade, IFNULL(IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 1, '基本维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 2, '中级维保', IF(MAX(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 3, '高级维保', NULL) ) ), '无维保') AS warrantyGradeName, MIN(wcs.`warrantyGradeStartTime`) warrantyGradeStartTime, MAX(wcs.`warrantyGradeEndTime`) warrantyGradeEndTime, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT wcs.gradedesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS warrantyGradeDesc,
pwc.id AS latestId, pwc.`renewalIntention` as latestRenewalIntention, pwc.`customInfo` ->> '$$.phoneAnswerState' AS latestPhoneAnswerState, pwc.`customInfo` ->> '$$.phoneAnswerStateName' AS latestPhoneAnswerStateName, pwc.`callbackTime` as latestCallbackTime, pwc.`nextCallbackTime` as latestNextCallbackTime, pwc.`remark` as latestRemark, pwc.customInfo AS customInfo, IFNULL(mpwc.callbackCount, 0) callbackCount, IFNULL(mpwc.renewalIntentionCount, 0) renewalIntentionCount, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.hasRenewal), 0) hasRenewal, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT renewalDesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS renewalDesc, IFNULL(MAX(wcs.hasLiscense), 0) hasLiscense, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT liscenseDesc SEPARATOR "\r\n") AS liscenseDesc FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode`
LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `view_warranty_contract_state` wcs ON wcs.`contractNo` = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-C", ""), "-L", "") LEFT JOIN (SELECT projectId, max(id) as id, count(id) as callbackCount, count(IF(renewalIntention = 1, 1, null)) as renewalIntentionCount FROM pm_project_warranty_callback GROUP BY projectId) mpwc ON mpwc.projectId = ph.projectId LEFT JOIN `pm_project_warranty_callback` pwc ON pwc.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND mpwc.id = pwc.id LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON pm.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND pm.projectType = ph.projectType AND pm.`memberRole` = "60" AND pm.`effectiveTo` is null LEFT JOIN pm_project_member slm ON slm.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND slm.projectType = ph.projectType AND slm.`memberRole` = "10" AND slm.`effectiveTo` is null LEFT JOIN `pm_project_related_party` prp ON prp.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND prp.`partyRole` = "30" AND prp.`effectiveTo` is null LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = pgr.`smsProjectCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data ssfs1 ON ssfs1.dataTypeCode = '15' AND ssfs1.basicDataId = ph.column012 AND ssfs1.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data ssfs2 ON ssfs2.dataTypeCode = '15' AND ssfs2.basicDataId = ph.columno12_readonly AND ssfs2.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.`departmentNum` = ph.`column001` LEFT JOIN fnd_company c force key(primary) ON c.id = ph.compId WHERE ph.`effectiveTo` is null

<if test=" prepend="AND" projectId> ph.projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="AND" projectCode> ph.projectCode like concat("%", #{projectCode}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" projectName> ph.projectName like concat("%", #{projectName}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" officeCode> ph.column001 = #{officeCode} <if test=" prepend="AND" industryName> ph.column005 like concat("%", #{industryName}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" agentChannel> prp.partyName like concat("%", #{agentChannel}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" finalCustomerName> ph.column013 like concat("%", #{finalCustomerName}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" customerNameNotFuzzy> #{customerNameNotFuzzy} = TRIM(IFNULL(ph.column013, "")) <if test=" prepend="AND" serviceImpl> #{serviceImpl} = IFNULL(ph.column012, ph.columno12_readonly) <if test=" prepend="AND" renewalIntentionInt> <if test=" renewalIntentionInt compareValue="-1"> pwc.renewalIntention is null <if test=" renewalIntentionInt compareValue="-1"> pwc.renewalIntention = #{renewalIntentionInt}
<if test=" customInfo>
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="customInfo.iterator[].value"> #customInfo.iterator[].value# = pwc.customInfo ->> '$$.$customInfo.iterator[].key$'
<if test=" prepend="AND" compId> ph.compId = #{compId} <if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyEndTimeStart> wcs.warrantyEndTime >= #{warrantyEndTimeStart} <if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyEndTimeEnd> #{warrantyEndTimeEnd} >= wcs.warrantyEndTime <if test=" prepend="AND" processStartTime> pwc.callbackTime >= #{processStartTime} <if test=" prepend="AND" processEndTime> #{processEndTime} >= pwc.callbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" callbackTimeStart> pwc.callbackTime >= #{callbackTimeStart} <if test=" prepend="AND" callbackTimeEnd> #{callbackTimeEnd} >= pwc.callbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" nextCallbackTimeStart> pwc.nextCallbackTime >= #{nextCallbackTimeStart} <if test=" prepend="AND" nextCallbackTimeEnd> #{nextCallbackTimeEnd} >= pwc.nextCallbackTime <if test=" prepend="AND" salerSearch> ( slm.memberCode = #{salerSearch} or slm.memberName like concat("%", #{salerSearch}, "%") or slm.phoneNum like concat("%", #{salerSearch}, "%") )
GROUP BY ph.projectCode
<if test=" prepend="AND" contractNos> contractNos like concat("%", #{contractNos}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" customerSearch> ( customer1 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") or customer2 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") or customerContact1 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") or customerContact2 like concat("%", #{customerSearch}, "%") )
<if test=" prepend="AND" customerContactSearch> ( customerContact1 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") or customerContact2 like concat("%", #{customerContactSearch}, "%") )
<if test=" prepend="AND" hasCallback> callbackCount > 0 <if test=" prepend="AND" hasRenewal> hasRenewal = #{hasRenewal} <if test=" prepend="AND" hasLiscense> hasLiscense = #{hasLiscense}
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_project_warranty_$tempSuffix$ ( KEY projectId (projectId), KEY warrantyStatus(warrantyStatus), KEY warrantyGrade(warrantyGrade), KEY callbackCount(callbackCount), KEY hasRenewal(hasRenewal), KEY hasLiscense(hasLiscense) ) AS
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_project_warranty_$tempSuffix$;
mapper.select: select count(distinct trim(IFNULL(finalCustomerName, ""))) from temp_project_warranty_$tempSuffix$ t

select trim(IFNULL(finalCustomerName, "")) finalCustomerName, count(*) as projectCount, group_concat(distinct officeName) as officeNames, count(IF(callbackCount > 0, 1, null)) callbackProjectCount, IFNULL(sum(callbackCount), 0) callbackCount, count(IF(renewalIntentionCount, 1, null)) renewalIntentionCount, count(IF(hasRenewal = 1, 1, null)) as renewalCount, count(IF(hasLiscense = 1, 1, null)) as liscenseCount, max(latestCallbackTime) as latestCallbackTime, max(latestNextCallbackTime) as latestNextCallbackTime from temp_project_warranty_$tempSuffix$ t group by trim(IFNULL(finalCustomerName, ""))
